hypotheses.name: Three-segment org: Operations / Finance / Engineering
hypotheses.agreement_summary: Layer 2 clusters and Layer 3 communities both partition into three groups.
hypotheses.divergence_summary: Layer 2 puts a few mixed-content memos in operations that Layer 3 places under finance.
hypotheses.narrative_argument_for: Filesystem hierarchy, embedding clusters, and entity co-occurrence all converge on three segments.
hypotheses.narrative_argument_against: A few overlapping documents could be re-assigned with no change in modularity.

hypotheses.name: Null hypothesis: undifferentiated whole
hypotheses.narrative_argument_for: If governance is centrally controlled, the partitioning may be cosmetic.
hypotheses.narrative_argument_against: Three coherent communities and three filesystem branches argue against a single unit.
